tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] (2x)    - [ch]G[/ch]
 
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]D7[/ch]
  Darlin I, I can't explain, where did we lose our way,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
girl, it’s drivin’ me insane[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                   
And I know I just need one more chance[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]                           [ch]D7[/ch]
to prove my love to you, if you come back to me,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
I guarantee that I'll never let you go.[/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong ?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back the way they used to be ?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                        ( [ch]C[/ch] )            
Oh God, give me a reason I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] (2x)    - [ch]G[/ch]
 
[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]D7[/ch]
   So many nights I dream of you, holding my pillow tight,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I know that I don't need to be alone.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]                               
When I open up my eyes to face reality,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D7[/ch]
every moment without you seems like eternity,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
I'm begging you, begging you : come back to me ![/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong ?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back the way they used to be ?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                        ( [ch]C[/ch] )           
Oh God, give me a reason I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] (2x)    - [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
Baby, I’m sorry,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                    
    please forgive me for all the wrong I’ve done[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]D7[/ch]
Please come back home girl, I know you put all your trust in me,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
I’m sorry, I let you down, please, forgive me ![/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]                           
(sung : ) Gonna swallow my pride, say I'm sorry,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
stop pointing fingers, the blame is on me.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]                               
I want a new life, and I want it with you,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
if you feel the same, don't ever let it go.[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]                                  
You gotta believe in the spirit of love,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]F#m[/ch]
it can heal all things, we won't hurt anymore.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
No I don't believe our love's terminal,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
I'm down on my knees,[/tab]
(song moves up half a note to capo 2nd here)
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
begging you please, come home.     [/tab]
 
[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Can we go back to the days our love was strong ?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Can you tell me how a perfect love goes wrong?[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Gm[/ch]
Can somebody tell me how to get things back the way they used to be ?[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]                        ( [ch]C[/ch] )           
Oh God, give me a reason I'm down on bended knee.[/tab]
 
[Outro] (capo 3)
[ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]C[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] (2x)    - [ch]G[/ch]
